g.text: React components in browser, served by Astro SSR
RESTful endpoints handle requests and status polling
Track agent tasks and docs with TTL-based cleanup
Bob Agent orchestrates specialized AI agents
Agents create branches and PRs for all changes
In-memory storage with caching for performance
Tech Stack: Astro • React • Node.js • TypeScript • TailwindCSS • DaisyUI • Starlight • GitHub API
